---
title: "From the Author's Desk"
listing:
  - id: newsletter-listing
    contents:
      - "posts/**/*.md"
      - "drafts/*.md"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 1
    categories: false
    date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
    feed: true
    fields: [title, date, image, description]
    image-height: "200px"
    max-description-length: 200
    filter-ui: true
    sort-ui: false
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    title-block: none
    css: newsletter.css
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}

```{=html}
<div class="newsletter-hero">
  <div class="newsletter-hero-content">
    <p class="newsletter-eyebrow">NEWSLETTER</p>
    <h1 class="newsletter-title">From the<br/>Author's Desk.</h1>
    <p class="newsletter-tagline">Updates, insights, and progress on the<br/>Machine Learning Systems curriculum.</p>
    <p class="newsletter-stats" id="newsletter-stats">11 issues · 900+ subscribers</p>
    <script>
    // Load dynamic stats if available
    fetch('_stats.yml').then(r => r.text()).then(txt => {
      const issues = txt.match(/issue_count:\s*(\d+)/);
      const subs = txt.match(/subscriber_display:\s*"([^"]+)"/);
      if (issues && subs) {
        document.getElementById('newsletter-stats').textContent =
          issues[1] + ' issues · ' + subs[1] + ' subscribers';
      }
    }).catch(() => {});
    </script>

    <!-- Subscribe button — triggers shared modal -->
    <div class="newsletter-subscribe-form">
      <button onclick="openModal()" class="newsletter-subscribe-btn-hero">Subscribe — it's free</button>
      <p class="newsletter-form-note">No spam · Unsubscribe anytime</p>
    </div>

    <p class="newsletter-cta">
      <a href="https://buttondown.com/mlsysbook/rss" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="newsletter-rss-btn"><i class="fas fa-rss"></i> RSS Feed</a>
      <a href="https://buttondown.com/mlsysbook/archive/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="newsletter-rss-btn"><i class="fas fa-archive"></i> Full Archive</a>
    </p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="newsletter-listing-header">
  <h2>Recent Issues</h2>
  <p>Essays, community spotlights, and curriculum updates.</p>
</div>
```

::: {#newsletter-listing}
:::

```{=html}
<div class="newsletter-bottom-cta">
  <p class="newsletter-bottom-text">Enjoyed reading? Get new issues delivered to your inbox.</p>
  <button onclick="openModal()" class="newsletter-bottom-btn">Subscribe →</button>
</div>
```

:::
